seoTitle: Barraba vs Barrack Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Barraba and Barrack Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Barraba vs Barrack Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barraba and Barrack Point.
heading: Barraba vs Barrack Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barraba, New South Wales and Barrack Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barraba has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Barrack Point (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barraba or Barrack Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barraba has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Barrack Point scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barraba scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Barrack Point scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barraba or Barrack Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barraba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
